query: SELECT tags, echoCategory, difficulty, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM quickfireQuestions WHERE isActive = 1 AND tags IS NOT NULL GROUP BY tags, echoCategory, difficulty ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 80;
